title: Xtra Creamy Kenyan Fideo Noodles
description: A nut-free, creamy, and comforting Kenyan dish featuring fideo noodles, perfect for a sick day, with a rich and nutty flavor from caramelized onions. This dish is a twist on traditional Kenyan cuisine, made with easily accessible ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fideo noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat and add the sliced onions, cooking until caramelized and golden brown.
In a separate saucepan, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat and whisk in the heavy cream, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the cream mixture by half, stirring constantly, until it thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Remove the cream mixture from the heat and stir in the grated cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked fideo noodles to the cheese sauce and toss until the noodles are well coated.
Add the caramelized onions to the noodle mixture and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the Xtra Creamy Kenyan Fideo Noodles hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
